text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! Your application has been approved and you have been granted the moderator role. We are glad to have you on board.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! Your application has been approved and you have been granted the event_helper role. Looking forward to working with you!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! Your application has been approved and you have been granted the mentor role. Excited to have you here!
